options.label: Adopt now
pros: Fastest path to shipping measurable value
Keeps momentum when evidence is already strong
cons: Risk of overfitting if signal breadth is medium
May pull in patterns that are not specific to our domain
options.best_when: The capability has specific, high-quality matches and clear fit for `repo_indexing_pipeline`

options.label: Adapt first
pros: Balances speed and safety by tailoring to project constraints
Reduces false positives before capability promotion
cons: Adds design and implementation time
Needs another evaluation loop before final acceptance
options.best_when: Signal is promising but too broad, noisy, or only partially specific

options.label: Reject for now
pros: Avoids introducing low-confidence behavior
Protects trust while discovery criteria are refined
cons: Delays potential capability gains
Requires a new repo cohort or sharper detection patterns
options.best_when: Required signals do not pass consistently or evidence is mostly generic

capability_evaluations.title: Repository indexing pipeline
capability_evaluations.description: Repo traversal, document extraction, and index-write flow for search.
capability_evaluations.why_useful_here: High-quality indexing controls both retrieval quality and evidence trust for capability cards.
query_hints: repository scan crawl index writer segments
capability_evaluations.recommendation_rationale: Recommend adapt because the capability is useful but needs tailoring before rollout (reason=broad-signal, high=7, medium=0, high_ratio=0.538).
